

| nFinia Digital Banking  |  Summerville Credit Union  |  Member User Guide |
| :---- |

**Block / Unblock Card**

|  |
| :---- |

*Module: Banking  ›  Cards  ›  Card Status toggle*

| 01  PRODUCT SUMMARY |
| :---- |

The Block / Unblock Card feature lets you instantly control whether your debit or credit card can be used for new transactions. A single toggle on the Cards page — Card Status — turns your card On (active) or Off (blocked). Both actions are immediate and require a quick confirmation. You can unblock your card at any time with the same toggle.

**At a Glance**

| Feature Name | Block / Unblock Card |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Also Known As** | Freeze Card, Card Status toggle |
| **Module Location** | Banking › Cards › Card Status |
| **Who Can Use** | All nFinia Digital Banking members |
| **Block Effect** | Card is immediately suspended — no new purchases, ATM withdrawals, or online transactions |
| **Unblock Effect** | Card is immediately reactivated for all transactions |
| **Confirmation Step** | A popup prompt appears before the action is applied |
| **Availability** | 24 / 7 — instant via web or mobile |

| 02  KEY USE CASES |
| :---- |

| Use Case | Member Goal | Steps | Outcome |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Block a card temporarily | Prevent unauthorized use while locating a misplaced card | Go to Cards, find the card, toggle Card Status to Off, confirm | Card is blocked immediately; can be unblocked when card is found |
| Unblock a card | Re-enable a card after it was temporarily blocked | Go to Cards, find the blocked card, toggle Card Status to On, confirm | Card is active again for all transactions |
| Block card on suspicion | Stop potential fraud without deactivating the card permanently | Toggle Card Status Off; monitor account activity; unblock if resolved | Card suspended quickly without requiring a replacement |
| Unblock after false alarm | Restore card access after confirming safety | Toggle Card Status back to On and confirm | Normal card access restored without any wait |

| 03  STEP-BY-STEP GUIDE |
| :---- |

| *📍  Navigation path: Banking › Cards* |
| :---- |

| ■  Blocking Your Card  (Card Status: On → Off) |
| :---- |

**Step 1  Go to your Cards**

From the nFinia home screen, select Cards in the top navigation bar. Your enrolled cards are listed with their card number, expiry, and current Card Status.

![][image1]

**Step 2  Toggle Card Status to Off**

Locate the card you want to block. Click the Card Status toggle — it will switch from On (blue/active) to Off. A confirmation prompt immediately appears asking you to confirm the block.

| ⚠️  Note: Blocking your card prevents ALL new transactions instantly, including scheduled or recurring payments linked to this card. |
| :---- |

**Step 3  Confirm the Block**

Review the confirmation popup. It will show the last 4 digits of the card being blocked. Click Yes to confirm, or No to cancel without making any change.

![][image2]

| ℹ️  Tip: After blocking, the Card Status toggle on the Cards page will show Off, so you always know which cards are currently suspended. |
| :---- |

| ■  Unblocking Your Card  (Card Status: Off → On) |
| :---- |

**Step 1  Go to your Cards**

Navigate to Banking › Cards. A blocked card will show Card Status: Off.

**Step 2  Toggle Card Status to On**

Click the Card Status toggle on the blocked card. It will switch from Off back to On (active). A confirmation prompt will appear asking you to confirm the unblock.

**Step 3  Confirm the Unblock**

In the confirmation popup, verify the card's last 4 digits and click Yes to reactivate. Your card is immediately ready for transactions once confirmed.

| ℹ️  Tip: Unblocking is instant — there is no waiting period. Your card can be used for purchases, ATM withdrawals, and online payments right away. |
| :---- |
